title: ITE Special Student Assistance Scheme (SSAS)
text:
ITE Special Student Assistance Scheme (SSAS) - SupportGoWhere
ITE Special Student Assistance Scheme (SSAS)
Share link
One-off financial assistance to help students tide over short-term financial difficulties.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
One-off financial assistance from $100 to $400
Apply online via the ITE portal. Click on iStudent icon > Financial Assistance icon.
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

One-off financial assistance from $100 to $400

The amount will depend on the needs of each individual student

Who is this for?

Full-time Singaporean ITE students who require financial assistance to tide over short-term financial difficulties

How to apply?

You can apply online via the ITE portal

If you need more help, refer to the step by step guide.

Where can I find help?

View more details

ITE Hotline: 1800 222 2111

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 03 Oct 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
